## Changes

### New Files
- src/protocols/mod.rs
- src/protocols/issue.rs
- src/protocols/spec.rs
- src/protocols/change.rs
- src/protocols/project.rs
- src/protocols/code_index.rs

### Modified Files
- src/lib.rs — add pub mod protocols

### No Breaking Changes
Existing types (Issue, SpecExcerpt, SessionState) remain. From/Into conversions added.
